entities.name: lists-health-check
entities.context: Command that checks N5 list system health and detects Phase 3 implementation triggers

entities.name: N5 lists system
entities.context: The lists management system being monitored for health

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Implementation phase triggered when list counts exceed thresholds (20+ critical, 30+ urgent)

entities.name: Phase 3.1
entities.context: Subset of Phase 3, recommended at 20+ lists

entities.name: List Count Monitoring
entities.context: Health check component that tracks total list count against warning (15+), critical (20+), and urgent (30+) thresholds

entities.name: Similarity Detection
entities.context: Health check component that identifies lists with high overlap via title keyword and tag analysis for potential merging

entities.name: Automatic Alerting
entities.context: Health check component that creates system-upgrade alerts when conditions warrant Phase 3, triggers once per event

relationships.context: Checks health of the N5 lists system
Uses list count monitoring as a health check component
Uses similarity detection to find merge candidates
Uses automatic alerting to notify about upgrade conditions
Creates alerts linking to Phase 3 implementation documentation
Phase 3.1 is a component of Phase 3 implementation
